name: Master Prompt Spec Test
persona: A PMM at a 50–500 person B2B SaaS company coordinating a GA launch across eng, marketing, sales, and support without a dedicated launch ops function
problem_statement: In the final week before a launch, generic copied checklists miss predictable cross-functional gaps, causing late go/no-go surprises and last-minute coordination thrash
artifact_type: single-page web app (scored audit + owner-grouped checklist export)
